mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO comment_content(post_id, year_month, content_id, content) VALUES
(#{c.postId}, #{c.yearMonth}, #{c.contentId}, #{c.content})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE content = VALUES(content), update_time = NOW()
mapper.select:
SELECT post_id, year_month, content_id, content, create_time, update_time FROM comment_content WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND (year_month, content_id) IN
(#{k.yearMonth}, #{k.contentId})
